response.justification: The candidate is an accomplished senior full-stack engineer, but their profile does not match this role's core requirements. Their C++ experience is limited to a ~7-month stint at National Instruments in 2014-2015 and a thesis project, far short of the mandatory 5-10 years of hands-on C++ on Windows. There is no evidence of SQL Server/Oracle depth, and no fixed income, derivatives, or capital markets domain experience — RIDE Capital was consumer-facing fintech, not investment banking. Strong general engineering fundamentals cannot substitute for the hard requirements here.
strengths: Broad, sustained engineering career with strong software craftsmanship practices (TDD, CI/CD, pairing)
Experience building low-latency, high-throughput systems (millions of HTTP requests/sec at Dunnhumby)
Solid DevOps and tooling background including CI/CD pipelines, Docker, and Kubernetes
concerns: C++ experience is minimal and dated (~7 months in 2014-2015), versus the mandatory 5-10 years on Windows
No fixed income, derivatives, or capital markets / investment banking domain experience
No demonstrated SQL Server or Oracle experience; database background is primarily MongoDB/MySQL

key_factors.factor: No fixed income / capital markets domain knowledge
Strong general engineering and performance-systems background
